AI Governance · by BlueVoyant

AI Governance
in 10 minutes

A self-service assessment that gives any CISO an instant, board-ready view of their AI risk posture — and a ready-to-deploy governance package.

Built on the DefenderXDR design system · Prepared for review

The problem

AI is already in the building.
Governance isn't.

Employees adopt AI faster than security can govern it. Most organizations can't answer a simple board question: "What's our AI risk, and what are we doing about it?"

73.8%

of workplace ChatGPT accounts are unauthorized.

Source: Cyberhaven / VentureBeat
70%

of organizations have Shadow AI in use.

Source: FastCompany
70%

of IT leaders aren't confident they can manage AI risk.

Source: Lenovo
What it is

Assess → Analyze → Act

A guided assessment turns a CISO's strategy and risk tolerance into a quantified posture and an executive-ready action plan — in one sitting, no consultant required.

1

Assess

Set your strategy and decide on 38 authentic, NIST-aligned AI controls across Anthropic, OpenAI, Microsoft, and shadow-AI.

2

Analyze

Get a weighted posture score, residual risk, maturity tier, NIST coverage, compliance gaps, and a phased roadmap.

3

Act

Download a board-ready package — executive summary, policy, risk register, roadmap, and deployment configs.

Step 1 · The assessment

Real controls, not a checklist

38 controls drawn from how these AI tools are actually governed — each a BLOCK/ALLOW decision with NIST alignment, rationale, and a consultant's take. Your strategy sets smart defaults; compliance selections lock in mandatory controls.

Step 2 · Board-ready analysis

A number you can take to the board

An instant dashboard: Governance Posture Score, Residual Risk Index, maturity tier, NIST AI RMF function coverage, compliance readiness, top residual risks, and a 3-phase roadmap.

Step 3 · The deliverable

An executive package, instantly

One download, generated from the assessment — everything a CISO needs to brief leadership and hand work to the team.

  • ✓Executive Summary — board-ready: score, maturity, top risks, next steps
  • ✓NIST AI RMF 1.0 Policy — tailored governance document
  • ✓Risk Register (CSV) — severity, residual risk, owner, phase — Excel/GRC-ready
  • ✓Implementation Roadmap — phased by impact & effort, with enforcement steps
  • ✓Compliance Crosswalk — coverage and gaps per framework & regulation
  • ✓Deployment configs — Intune, Jamf, PowerShell, Bash
How it's delivered

On-brand and ready to embed

Styled to match defenderxdr.com and fully self-contained — no runtime dependencies. Captures the prospect's name and email, then delivers the package as a direct, instant download.

LEAD CAPTURE

Name + email

Every download is a qualified lead for BlueVoyant.

ZERO FRICTION

Instant download

No email round-trip — the package builds in the browser.
